title: H2A Loss Event
description: Operational / actuarial record associated with the commercial profile. NOT a Core conformance requirement. One record per halt, per horizon breach, and per near-miss above a configurable threshold. The accumulated corpus is the loss table — the actuarial asset (ADR-011). These are PREVENTION events (a stopped or narrowly-stopped act), not indemnity claims: remedy_triggered records whether a service-credit remedy followed, never a payout. Design it now while volume is small enough to backfill.

event_type.description: halt = an in-flight act was stopped; horizon_breach = measured horizon exceeded the committed horizon; near_miss = a stopped/avoided loss above the configured threshold.

record_id.description: Decision Record this event derives from, if any.

exposure_at_risk.description: Declared exposure on the act(s) at risk in this event.

remedy_triggered.description: Whether a service-credit remedy followed. Never an indemnity payout (ADR-011).

remediation_ref.description: Pointer to the remediation record / ticket.

near_miss_threshold_ms.description: The configured near-miss threshold in force, when event_type = near_miss.
